title: Vegas Graduation Bash
description: Celebrate graduation in style with a wild Vegas trip! Hit the casinos, catch world-class shows, and party on the Strip with your crew.

title: NYC Weekend Getaway
description: Explore the city that never sleeps! From Times Square to Central Park, catch a Broadway show and eat your way through the five boroughs.

title: Miami Beach Bachelor Party
description: Sun, sand, and nightlife — Miami has it all. Spend the days on South Beach and the nights at the best clubs in the city.

title: Rocky Mountain Road Trip
description: Hit the open road through Colorado's stunning Rockies. Hike, camp, and take in breathtaking views of national parks along the way.

title: New Orleans Jazz Fest
description: Immerse yourself in the culture, cuisine, and live music of the Big Easy. Bourbon Street, beignets, and jazz every night.

title: Pacific Coast Highway Drive
description: Drive the legendary PCH from San Francisco to Los Angeles, stopping at Big Sur, Morro Bay, and Santa Barbara along the way.
